description: World's largest healthcare booking platform operating in 15 countries. Serves 260,000+ doctors, 22,000+ clinics, and 90M+ patients monthly. Strong presence in Poland, Spain, Italy, Turkey, and Latin America.
business_model: B2B - SaaS subscription to healthcare providers; B2C free booking for patients
target_market: Healthcare providers globally, especially Poland, Spain, Italy, Turkey, Brazil, Mexico
key_investors: Insight Partners, One Peak Partners, Goldman Sachs, Fidelity
competitive_advantage: Largest global footprint, multi-country expertise, full practice management suite

varden_fit.rationale: Potential distribution partner for occupational health in Eastern Europe
